content.rendered:
Nick van de Wall, professionally known as Afrojack, is a Dutch DJ, music programmer, record producer and remixer.
He founded the record label Wall Recordings; his debut album Forget the World was released in 2014.
You can regularly find him in the top 10 of best artist in the Top 100 DJs published by DJ Mag.

Since 2012 we take care of all the lightshows worldwide.
